name: shuck
description: Get the exact failing CI step logs for a GitHub pull request via the shuck CLI. Adds a /shuck skill, a local MCP server (inspect_pr / inspect_run tools) that runs the shuck binary from your PATH, and a SessionStart hook that checks shuck is installed, recent enough for the MCP server, and that a GitHub token is present. Install shuck yourself and keep it current with `shuck upgrade`.
